title: begonia × coronata
intro: Begonia × coronata is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Begonia × hybrida and B. corallina, known for its unique and attractive foliage. The Begonia × coronata plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as supporting the immune system and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Begonia × coronata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
